name: Moots
long_description:
Moots is defining a new category , Guest Intelligence for corporate events. Every event tool today handles logistics: invitations, RSVPs, badges. None answer the questions that actually drive revenue: who should be in this room, why they matter, and whether the event created outcomes. We built the platform that does.
Before the event, AI agents score every guest candidate 0–100 against your objectives, enriching profiles across dozens of intelligence sources in seconds — not the hours it takes a team to manually vet names one by one. PR partners, sponsors, and internal stakeholders collaborate on curated guest lists directly in the platform, each seeing only what they need to.
At the event, every team member receives personalized briefing packets: who to meet, what to discuss, and shared connections to reference. Walk-ins and plus-ones are profiled in real time and routed to the right person on your team instantly.
After the event, personalized follow-ups go out within hours — not weeks. Every interaction syncs to Salesforce or HubSpot, and leadership gets a clear ROI dashboard tying each guest to pipeline outcomes.
For guests, Moots is equally transformative. A dedicated guest experience app shows attendees who's in the room, why specific people matter to them, and who to meet — turning passive attendance into meaningful connections that last well beyond the event.
Trusted by corporate event teams, PR agencies, financial institutions, and advisory firms running branded houses at Cannes Lions, satellite dinners, investor retreats, and client cultivation events. Works standalone or alongside HubSpot, Salesforce, Splash, Paperless Post, and Luma.
one_liner: The guest intelligence platform for high-value corporate events
